name: rasa.domain.core
description:
RasaOS Domain · Core. The unified canonical template every domain Element follows. Locked-down v1.0.0 shape (Phase 2 complete): canon-required files (§4) + bin/init + bin/check-manifest + Apache-2.0 LICENSE + content/SHAPE.md documenting the two shape patterns (toolkit + structural) + scaffold subdirs (skills/, rules/, agents/ as opt-in starter for toolkit-shape forks).

Fork this to author a new domain. Decide upfront which shape pattern fits — toolkit (skills/rules/agents like rasa.domain.code), structural (firm/drives/members like rasa.domain.legal), or hybrid. Delete SHAPE.md from your fork; replace with your domain's content/README.md. The Element ships zero domain knowledge — only the universal shape.

Distinct from rasa.core (kind: core, the L1 shared bones every Element depends on). domain-core is the template for the domain KIND; rasa.core is the L1 dependency. Different concerns; both named 'core' for canonical positioning.

rasa.note: Canonical domain template per canon ELEMENT_CONTRACT.md v1.3+ §4 (required files) + §7 (install policies). v1.0.0 is the locked-down shape: forks may pin to this version and absorb later minor bumps as additive. shape_pattern='agnostic' here flags that this template does not commit to toolkit/structural/hybrid; forks set their own. See content/SHAPE.md for the choice.

element.description: Files mirrored into the install target per canon ELEMENT_CONTRACT.md §7. The v1.0.0 template ships these as opt-in scaffold — registered for check-manifest coverage but not installed automatically. Forks change the policy to directory-mirror/file-replace as they populate content/.

files.note: Fork-time guide explaining toolkit vs structural shape patterns. Not installed into consumer projects. Forks should delete this from their copy and replace with content/README.md describing what's actually shipped.
Toolkit-shape scaffold subdir. Forks that adopt the toolkit pattern populate this and change policy to directory-mirror. Structural-shape forks delete this entry + the directory.
Toolkit-shape scaffold subdir. Forks adopting toolkit add rule .md files here + change policy. Note canonical install target is .claude/ root (rules install flat per domain-code precedent).
Toolkit-shape scaffold subdir for Claude subagent definitions. Forks adopting toolkit add agent .md files here + change policy to directory-mirror.

seed.description: One-time files copied at install only. Per canon ELEMENT_CONTRACT.md §7.

files.note: Per-project Claude session contract. Lives in install-target root; project-owned forever. Placeholder-free (Element identity lives in .claude/rasa.lock.json — current install-policy taxonomy doesn't substitute placeholders in skip-if-exists files; flagged in v0.1.0 AUDIT).

Stamped with the Element HEAD commit SHA at init time. Lockfile shape per canon Spec §6 (Connection Contract). Substitutes {{ELEMENT_NAME}}, {{ELEMENT_KIND}}, {{ELEMENT_VERSION}}, {{ELEMENT_REPO}}, {{ELEMENT_BRANCH}}, {{ELEMENT_SHA}}, {{TODAY}} placeholders via bin/init's init-only-with-sha handler.

scaffold.description: Empty directories created at init. v1.0.0 ships none — forks add as needed.
